hero.title: Monitor Amazon pricing. List to eBay. Repeat.
hero.subtitle: Track products across Amazon, analyze opportunities with Checkila intelligence, and publish to eBay—all in one workflow.

tracking.title: Tracking that stays current
tracking.description: Monitor Amazon pricing, inventory signals, and movement with fewer manual checks.

analysis.title: Checkila Analysis built in
analysis.description: Use credits on fast Checkila Analysis workflows to validate opportunities before listing.

listing.title: Listing control and support
listing.description: Keep every draft editable, organized, and supported by responsive service coverage.

workflowSection.title: A clean sequence for discovery, comparison, and launch.
workflowSection.clarity1: Keep tracking counts and daily lookups visible from the first screen.
workflowSection.clarity2: Use a premium plan grid to make upgrades feel simple, not crowded.
workflowSection.clarity3: Keep the page flexible so your own images and future sections can slot in cleanly.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Start from Amazon lookup, Checkila Analysis, or a product you already track.

decide.title: Decide
decide.description: Compare pricing, credits, and account limits before you commit to a plan.

publish.title: Publish
publish.description: Move into your eBay workflow with a clear structure and fewer surprises.

pricing.title: Flexible subscription plans, plus data analytics packages.
pricing.description: Choose between subscription, analytics, and Amazon monitoring packages based on your workflow.
pricing.subscriptionDescription: Choose the plan that matches your product count, daily lookup needs, and access level.
pricing.analyticsDescription: For users who want Checkila Analysis credits and a focused analytics workflow.
pricing.amazonMonitoringDescription: Dedicated Amazon monitoring tiers for users who need product tracking and lookup controls.
pricing.noPlans: No plans configured yet. Ask admin to add plans in Admin Panel.

cta.startWithPlan: Start with the plan that matches your volume, then scale when the workflow proves itself.
cta.readyDescription: Open the portal or ask for a custom fit after you review the plans.

contact.title: Have questions?
contact.description: Get in touch with our team
